This page is about getting Accessors to run under TockOS . TockOS is what is used by the Signpost . Rust The TockOS kernel is written in Rust, but TockOS userland programs are written in C. Since the Rust Host uses Duktape and Duktape is in C, then

Rust Host uses Duktape and Duktape is in C, then we can write our userland Accessor Host in C. See Also Hail - First TockOS Target Duktape Host - Small JavaScript interpreter that could be run as a userland program TockOS Signpost - List of TockOS b
